title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXII. Natural History.
content:
Lady bird, lady bird, fly away home,
        Thy house is on fire, thy children all gone,
        All but one, and her name is Ann,
        And she crept under the pudding-pan.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLXII. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
